name: Pumpkin Chocolate Chip Cookies #4
recipeIngredient: 1 cup chocolate chips or peanut butter chips
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C). Grease a cookie sheet.
2. Sift together the flour, baking powder, cinnamon, baking soda, and nutmeg.
3. In a mixing bowl, beat the butter until creamy. Add brown sugar and beat until well combined.
4. Beat in the egg, then stir in the pumpkin and vanilla extract.
5. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the wet mixture, stirring just until incorporated.
6. Stir in the chocolate chips or peanut butter chips (dough should be soft).
7. Drop by spoonfuls onto the prepared cookie sheet.
8. Bake for 8-10 minutes, or until edges are lightly browned.
9. Allow cookies to cool on baking sheet for a few minutes before transferring them to a wire rack to cool completely.
Makes approximately 48 cookies.
